title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models
hook: Imagine typing a prompt and watching a photorealistic scene appear from noise.
promise: You will understand how classifier-free guidance makes text-to-image diffusion models more faithful to your prompt.
prerequisite_note: You only need a sense of how noisy processes can be reversed to create order.

glossary.plain: A generative model that creates data by gradually removing noise from a random input.
Using a text prompt to steer the image generation process.
A way to guide generation without needing a separate classifier model.
The process of turning noisy data into a clear, meaningful image.
Generating images based on a specific input, like a text description.
Generating images without any guiding input or prompt.

cards.title: Text to Stunning Image
body: Discover how GLIDE made text-guided image generation more accurate and photorealistic through classifier-free guidance.

cards.title: From words to visuals
body: Imagine describing a scene with words and seeing a computer create a matching, realistic image from scratch. This is no longer science fiction.
GLIDE brought us closer to this dream by making diffusion models listen more closely to your text, generating images that truly fit your words.

cards.title: How GLIDE turns text into images
body: First, GLIDE starts with pure noise and a text prompt. The model then repeatedly denoises, each time using the prompt for guidance.
Instead of needing a separate classifier to steer the process, GLIDE learns to listen to your prompt directly, blending conditional and unconditional signals.
cards.caption: GLIDE removes noise step by step, using your words to shape each stage.

cards.title: How does guidance change the result?
body: See what happens when we generate images with and without classifier-free guidance.
cards.offNote: Images sometimes ignore the prompt or look less realistic. Requires an extra classifier model.
cards.onNote: Images match the prompt better and look more natural, using only the diffusion model.

cards.title: The classifier-free guidance trick
body: GLIDE realized you can get strong prompt control without a separate classifier. Instead, you train the model to sometimes ignore the prompt during learning.
At generation time, you blend the model's predictions with and without the prompt, dialing up how much it listens to your words. This gives both faithfulness and flexibility.

cards.title: How much guidance is best?
body: Adjust how strongly the model follows your text prompt during image generation.
cards.low: Images are diverse but may ignore your prompt.
cards.mid: Balanced: images mostly match prompt and look natural.
cards.high: Images fit prompt closely but may look less realistic or show artifacts.

cards.title: Choose the key ingredients for GLIDE
body: Which parts must you combine to get GLIDE's results? Pick all that apply.

choices.label: Diffusion process
choices.note: Creates images by denoising from random noise.

choices.label: Text encoder
choices.note: Turns your prompt into something the model understands.

choices.label: Classifier-free guidance
choices.note: Controls how much the image follows the prompt.

choices.label: Unconditional training
choices.note: Teaches the model to generate images without prompts too.

choices.label: Conditional training
choices.note: Teaches the model to generate images based on prompts.

choices.label: No separate classifier
choices.note: Removes the need for an extra classifier model.

cards.title: Sharper, more faithful images
body: GLIDE's classifier-free guidance made text-to-image results much more faithful to the prompt, and often more photorealistic, compared to older methods.
This innovation set a new standard for controllable, high-quality image generation and inspired many later diffusion models.
cards.caption: GLIDE improved both prompt matching and realism, with fewer moving parts.

cards.title: Why GLIDE changed the game
body: GLIDE showed that you do not need a separate classifier to guide text-to-image generation. This made models simpler and more robust.
Its classifier-free guidance trick is now a foundation for most modern diffusion models, making text-driven creativity more accessible and reliable.

recap.label: Start
recap.note: Begin with random noise and a text prompt.

recap.label: Guide
recap.note: Blend predictions with and without the prompt.

recap.label: Denoise
recap.note: Iteratively remove noise, guided by your words.

recap.label: Reveal
recap.note: Produce a photorealistic image that matches the prompt.

cards.title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models
body: Read the full paper for technical details and more results from the GLIDE team.
